hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.java-coding-standards" 2>/dev/null && git -c http.lowSpeedLimit=1000 -c http.lowSpeedTime=3 fetch -q origin main 2>/dev/null && [[ $(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main) -gt 0 ]] && echo "NOTE: .java-coding-standards is $(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main) commits behind upstream/main. Run /init-java to refresh." || true'
